race.comment: The well-related LIPIZZANER (3) (half to G2 winner First Settler) was well supported on debut at the Sunny Coast but just ran into a couple better on that occasion. Has since been given time to furnish and where there's smoke there's fire. Can return a winner. REIGN OF DAME (11) is knocking on the door of a maiden victory with three consecutive placings and this is not an overly strong affair. Can finally get the job done. THE GRAND DUCHY (6) strips fitter second-up from the break and should get the run of the race from the inside alley. Top-three credentials. FAWUNDERPAR (2) also hails from a handy family (half to G2 winner Blueberry Hill) and will be better with that debut effort now under the belt. Include with Wiggins on top. INBESTIGATOR (8) is facing the starter for the first time but has shown ability at the trials and any market confidence must be noted.
